response.justification: Bogdan is a highly experienced software craftsman with deep expertise in the required TypeScript, Node.js, and React stack, along with explicit, recent experience building AI agent infrastructure. His extensive background in TDD, cloud platforms, and scalable architecture perfectly aligns with the senior fullstack requirements, making him a standout candidate.
strengths: Extensive full-stack TypeScript, Node.js, and React experience
Recent, highly relevant experience with AI agent development and MCP
Exceptional testing background with a strong focus on TDD and CI/CD
concerns: May be overqualified given recent Staff-level positions
Nest.js and Vitest are not explicitly mentioned by name
Significant time spent on niche technologies like DLang
